rooms.subtitle: Amasomo yawe yo gusobanura icyarimwe
rooms.noRoomsInCategory: Nta byumba biri muri iki cyiciro kugeza ubu.

confirmDelete.message: Ibi bizafunga inama ku bitabiriye bose kandi bihanagure amakuru yose.

enterprise.sub: Urufunguzo rwa Gemini, Quest Flow, tagi, CRM

admin.label: Admin Panel
admin.sub: Gushyiraho uburyo bwo guhuza serivisi n'izindi serivisi

call.waitingSubtitle: Gutegereza ko umuntu uganira n'abandi asubiza...
call.playgroundTip: Ohereza interuro ku kibuga cy'amahugurwa cya AI
call.expandPeerSub: Interlocutor iri kuri ecran yuzuye, uri mu mfuruka
call.validating: Kugerageza guhuza VibeVox mu buryo bwizewe…
call.roomFull: 🚫 Icyumba cyuzuye — hari abantu 2 bamaze kwitabira

coach.title: Umufasha wa AI: Uburyo bwo gusubiza
coach.promptPlaceholder: Baza ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose - ku kiganiro cyangwa ikibazo icyo ari cyo cyose cyawe

tonePrompts.joke: Subiza ukoresheje urwenya rworoshye kandi rukwiye.
tonePrompts.formal: Subiza mu buryo bugaragara kandi bw'ikinyabupfura.
tonePrompts.deep: Tanga igisubizo cyimbitse cy’isesengura gifite ishingiro.
tonePrompts.scientific: Subiza nk'umuhanga mu bya siyansi, ukoresheje amasano ajyanye n'ubushakashatsi cyangwa amakuru.
tonePrompts.empathic: Subiza ubigiranye impuhwe, wemere ibyiyumvo by'undi muntu.

roomActions.deleteSub: Funga inama hanyuma usibe amakuru yose

billing.quotaExhaustedSub: Imashini yo guhindura inyandiko yahagaritswe. Nyamuneka gura iminota y'inyongera.
billing.lowBalanceSub: Gura iminota y'inyongera kugira ngo ikiganiro cyawe gikomeze.
billing.paywallNoSub: Kugira ngo ukore icyumba, nyamuneka iyandikishe kuri gahunda
billing.paywallLowBalance: Nta minota isigaye ku mafaranga usigaranye - iyandikishe kuri gahunda cyangwa ugure byinshi

changePwd.title: Hindura ijambo ry'ibanga
changePwd.errWrongCurrent: Ijambobanga ririho ubu ntabwo ari ryo
changePwd.errNoPassword: Guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga ntibiraboneka kuri iyi konti (kwinjira muri Google).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: Ijambobanga rya super-admin rishyirwa muri configuration ya seriveri.

sip.title: Telefoni ya SIP
sip.subtitle: Gushyiraho imiyoboro ya SIP yo guhamagara abantu binjira n'abasohoka
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Ijambobanga rishya (siga ubusa kugira ngo ridahinduka)

incoming.heading: Guhamagara SIP bije
incoming.lead: Aderesi ya SIP yihariye yo kohereza amahamagara yo hanze avuye ku mutanga serivisi yawe kuri sisitemu ya VibeVox.
incoming.emptyHint: Kora SIP URI yihariye + kwinjira/ijambo ry'ibanga kugira ngo abakiriya baguhamagare kuri telefoni iyo ari yo yose, kandi VibeVox izahindura ijwi ryawe mu buryo bwikora mu gihe nyacyo.
incoming.create: Kora aderesi ya SIP y'abantu baza guhamagara
incoming.paused: Aderesi ya SIP yashyizweho, kwakira abantu bihagaritswe
incoming.activeHint: Umusemuzi wa Bridge yumva icyumba. Buri guhamagara guhindurwa mu buryo butunguranye.
incoming.pausedHint: Koresha uburyo bwo kwakira abantu kugira ngo VibeVox itangire kohereza amahamagara yinjira.
incoming.toggleFailed: Yananiwe guhindura uburyo bwo kwakira abantu

outbound.heading: Guhamagara usohoka
outbound.lead: Hamagara nimero ya terefone ukoresheje interineti, maze VibeVox izahindura ikiganiro cyawe mu buryo bwikora mu kanya nyako.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Ubwa mbere, shyiraho umuyoboro wa SIP usohoka
outbound.noTrunkHint: Uzuza ifishi ya "New SIP Trunk" hejuru y'urupapuro - VibeVox izakoresha umutanga serivisi wawe wa SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, nibindi) mu guhamagara.
outbound.configureFirst: Ubwa mbere, shyiraho umuyoboro wa SIP usohoka (ishusho iri hejuru)
outbound.invalidNumber: Andika inomero ikwiye mu buryo mpuzamahanga (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Uburyo bwo gushyiraho
howTo.step1: Shaka impapuro z'uburenganzira bwa SIP trunk zivuye ku mutanga serivisi (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Bishyire muri fomu iri hejuru hanyuma ubibike.
howTo.step3: VibeVox izahita ikora umuyoboro wa SIP usohoka muri LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Bizaza vuba: SIP URI iri kwinjira yo kohereza terefone hanze.

tenantOnly.title: Imyoboro ya SIP ishyirwaho ku rwego rw'abakodesha
tenantOnly.hint1: Telefoni ya SIP ntishobora gushyirwaho hakoreshejwe konti ya superadmin (nta UUID y'umukodesha).
tenantOnly.hint2: Injira nk'umukoresha usanzwe ufite tenantId ye bwite kugira ngo ukore umuyoboro wa SIP.

sip.connected: Umuyoboro wa SIP ubitswe kandi ugahuzwa na LiveKit

sections.providerData: Ibisobanuro birambuye ku mutanga serivisi za SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Igenamiterere rizasibwa. Guhamagara bizahagarara kugeza igihe wongeye gukora umuyoboro wa SIP.
danger.deleteInbound: Kuraho aderesi ya SIP ku bantu bahamagara
danger.deleteInboundHint: Itegeko rya LiveKit ryo kwinjira n'itegeko ryo kohereza rizakurwaho. Guhamagara binjira ntibizongera kwakirwa.
danger.reissueHint: Ongera utange uburyo bwo kwinjira n'ijambo ry'ibanga kuri aderesi ya SIP. Amakuru ashaje ntazongera gukora.

outbound2.rateInfo: Igiciro ku munota w'umuhamagaro usohoka kigenwa n'umutanga serivisi za SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Iki gikorwa ntigisubirwaho. Iyo gisibamye, guhamagara bizahagarara kugeza igihe hakozwe umuyoboro wa SIP mushya.
confirm.deleteInboundTitle: Kuraho aderesi ya SIP ku bantu binjira?
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Iki gikorwa ntigisubirwaho. Itegeko ry’ibanze ry’injira n’iryo kohereza muri LiveKit Cloud rizasibwa.

page.title: Igenamiterere rya Enterprise
page.subtitle: Uburyo bwose bwo guhuza, imfunguzo, n'ibipimo bya AI kuri konti yawe
page.upsellTitle: Iki gice kiraboneka kuri gahunda ya Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: Aha ushobora gushyiraho: urufunguzo rwa Gemini API, urubuga rwo gushakisha amakuru n'ubumenyi, guhuza na Quest Flow + Telegram bot, no guhuza na Chatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Urufunguzo rwa Google Gemini API
gemini.lead: Urufunguzo bwite rwa AI Studio. Uru rusimbura urufunguzo mpuzamahanga rw'amatelefone yose ya Gemini kuri konti yawe.
gemini.leadPrefix: Urufunguzo rw'umuntu ku giti cye ruvuye kuri
gemini.leadSuffix: . Ikoreshwa aho gukoresha iy'isi yose kuri Gemini zose kuri konti yawe.
gemini.errEnterKey: Andika urufunguzo rwawe rwa Gemini API
gemini.successValid: Urufunguzo ni ingirakamaro - Gemini API irahari.
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Imikorere ya AI izakoresha urufunguzo rwa VibeVox rushanyijwe (niba rwashyizweho).

telegram.heading: Bot ya Telegram yo gutanga amatangazo
telegram.lead: Kora roboti ukoresheje @BotFather hanyuma ushyiremo ikimenyetso cyayo. Umuntu wese uzaza kuri iyi roboti azahabwa ubutumwa: abakiriya bashya, tagi, amakosa yo kwihuza. Ushobora kwiyandikisha ku bakozi benshi cyangwa kongeramo roboti mu itsinda cyangwa umuyoboro—amatangazo azoherezwa kuri buri wese mu buryo bwikora.
telegram.leadAfterStart: , izakira amatangazo yerekeye abakiriya bashya, tagi, n'amakosa yo kwihuza. Ushobora kwiyandikisha ku bakozi benshi cyangwa kongeramo roboti mu itsinda cyangwa umuyoboro—buri wese azahabwa ayo makuru mu buryo bwikora.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} yarabitswe. Indamukanyo yatanzwe ku bafatabuguzi ba {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} yarabitswe. Umuntu wese uzayitumaho ubutumwa bugufi / azajya ahabwa ubutumwa.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Ubutumwa bwatanzwe ku bantu {{count}}. Nyamuneka reba kuri Telegram.

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Bika hanyuma ugenzure urufunguzo rwa API mbere na mbere — gukora amashusho birarukeneye.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana ikora, igatunganya no guhimba. Imagen ikora gusa kuva ku busa.

prompt.heading: Inama
prompt.subtitle: Icyitonderwa n'ubumenyi bw'inyandiko zanditswe mu byumba by'amashusho gusa
prompt.promptLabel: Uburyo bwo gukoresha sisitemu (ijwi, imiterere, amagambo)
prompt.kbLabel: Ishingiro ry'ubumenyi (imiterere y'ikigo, Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa, amakuru arambuye)
prompt.appendNote: Ushobora kongeramo amategeko yawe bwite - azahuzwa n'ayasanzwe.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: gusa ku bijyanye no gukuraho ubusobanuro bw'ubutumwa mu byumba by'amashusho
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - iyo ukanze ku butumwa mu kiganiro hanyuma ugahitamo ijwi
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Ikoreshwa iyo ukanze ku butumwa mu kiganiro cyo mu cyumba cy'amashusho hanyuma ugahitamo ijwi
prompt.defaultSummary: Icyo AI ikoresha ubusanzwe (niba agace kawe karimo ubusa) - kanda kugira ngo urebe
prompt.extendNoteText: hamwe n'amategeko/uburyo/amagambo yabo bwite - bizahuzwa n'umuburo usanzwe wavuzwe haruguru hamwe n'ubumenyi.
prompt.kbHeading: Ishingiro ry'Ubumenyi — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Shyira inyandiko—kataloge, Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa, urutonde rw'ibiciro, amabwiriza, cyangwa ibikoresho by'amakuru. Ibikubiye muri iyo nyandiko bishyirwa kuri seriveri (Word/Excel/CSV → inyandiko) kandi bigashyirwa hamwe na AI mu gihe cyo kwandika ubutumwa mu byumba bya videwo. Umupaka: dosiye ya 50 MB / inyuguti 500.000 muri database.
prompt.successFileTruncated: Ibikubiye muri iyo nyandiko byagabanijwemo inyuguti {{max}}.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Inyandiko zose zashyizwe ahagaragara zizashira. Iki gikorwa ntigishobora gusubizwa inyuma.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Mu kiganiro cya Enterprise Room, ushobora gushyira ahagaragara ubutumwa ubwo aribwo bwose hanyuma ugasaba AI kubusobanura mu ijwi ryatoranijwe. Kanda
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: ikoresha igitekerezo cyawe cyo mu mwanya uri hejuru.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Ibisubizo bya AI ku bakiriya binyuze kuri bots za Telegram na Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Iyo umurima urimo ubusa, hakoreshwa uburyo rusange bwa VibeVox.
questFlow.promptLabel: Uburyo bwa sisitemu ya Quest Flow
questFlow.headerLead: Ikiganiro cya AI na buri mukiriya ku giti cye binyuze kuri bot ya Telegram ihujwe na Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysHeading: Imfunguzo za API za Quest Flow
questFlow.keysLead: Buri rufunguzo ni ibanga ushyira muri Quest Flow HTTP block y'uruhererekane. VibeVox irukoresha kugira ngo imenye konti yawe. Ushobora gukora urufunguzo rwinshi rw'uruhererekane rutandukanye.
questFlow.noKeysHint: Nta mfunguzo zirahari. Kora iya mbere.
questFlow.promptLead1: Igena UKO AI ivugana n'abakiriya binyuze muri Quest Flow: ijwi, imiterere, n'icyo umuntu agomba kumenya.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Icyo AI ikoresha ubusanzwe (niba agace kawe karimo ubusa) - kanda kugira ngo urebe
questFlow.kbLead1: Inyandiko - kataloge ya serivisi, urutonde rw'ibiciro, Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa. Shyira TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI ntabwo izaba ifite amakuru ajyanye n'ikigo; izasubiza gusa hashingiwe ku bumenyi rusange. Iki gishingirwaho
questFlow.kbLead3: Kuva mu gice cya "Amahitamo"—ku bijyanye no kwandika videwo. Umupaka: dosiye ya 50 MB / inyuguti 500.000 muri database.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Ubumenyi bwa Quest Flow buzakurwaho. Iki gikorwa ntigishobora gusubizwa inyuma.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI iha abakiriya izi tagi iyo ibonye ko zihuye mu kiganiro. Tagi zerekwa ku ikarita y'icyumba cy'umukiriya hanyuma zohererezwa kuri CRM (Igice cya 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Urufunguzo ruzasibwa burundu. Quest Flow izahagarara gukora binyuze kuri urwo rufunguzo — uzakenera gukora urufunguzo rushya no kurusimbuza muri Quest Flow.

chatwoot.heading: Guhuza CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Ohereza amateka y'amahamagara n'amatagi kuri Chatwoot mu buryo bwikora.
chatwoot.headerLead: Yohereza amateka y'ibiganiro n'ibisobanuro by'ibyo abakiriya bakeneye kuri Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: Aderesi ya Chatwoot (ikoresha urubuga rwawe bwite cyangwa app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Agent Access Token (kuva kuri Profile → Access Token)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Ihuza riri gukora - Chatwoot iri gusubiza.
chatwoot.successSaved: Byabitswe. Noneho kanda "Genzura isano" kugira ngo urebe.
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Uburyo bwo kuvugana n'umukiriya (na telegram_user_id, hamwe n'ibiranga_custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Ikiganiro gifite inyandiko yihariye = amateka yuzuye y'ibiganiro
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Yoherezwa iyo ukanze ku giti cyawe "Ohereza kuri CRM" mu kiganiro cyo mu cyumba. Kohereza mu buryo bwikora iyo ubonye ikimenyetso ni cyo kintu gikurikiraho.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Iki gikorwa ntigishobora guhindurwa. Inyandiko n'amakuru byashyizwemo bizasibwa.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: Dosiye ifatika nayo izasibwa kuri seriveri.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Ibyumba byo kuganira ni umwihariko wa Enterprise. Vugurura gahunda yawe mu gice cyitwa "Ibiciro".
chat.empty: Nta butumwa buri muri iki kiganiro buhari.
chat.fromTranscript: Kuva ku nyandiko mvugo yo guhamagara

insights.title: Isesengura ry'ibiganiro
insights.tooShort: Ikiganiro ni kigufi cyane ku buryo kidashobora gusesengura.

lobby.title: Kwinjira mu nama ya videwo
lobby.subtitle: Guhamagara kuri videwo hamwe n'ubuhinduzi bwa AI icyarimwe
lobby.languageHint: Uzumva kandi urebe amagambo ahinnye y’umuntu uganira nawe muri urwo rurimi.
lobby.shareHint: Kopisha hanyuma wohereze uwo muganira kugira ngo abatumire mu nama.
lobby.audioConsent: , kandi bemera ko amajwi atunganywa kugira ngo ahindurwe.
lobby.footerTagline: Ubuhinduzi bushingiye ku buhanga bwa AI
lobby.roomFullMsg: Hari umuntu usanzwe witabiriye inama. Vugana n'uwashinze inama cyangwa usabe indi nshya.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Iyi link yakiriwe. Yohereze kuri Telegram / WhatsApp / Imeli. Ushobora gufunga urupapuro ubu—iyi link ihora ikora.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Kugira ngo ukore icyumba, nyamuneka iyandikishe kuri gahunda
paywall.titleLowBalance: Nta minota isigaye ku mafaranga usigaranye - iyandikishe kuri gahunda cyangwa ugure byinshi
paywall.subtitle: Hitamo gahunda cyangwa ugure iminota myinshi - wishyure ukoresheje Stripe, usubize amafaranga yawe ako kanya hano.
paywall.featureHd: Amajwi ya HD, videwo, umutoza wa AI
paywall.topupNote: Iminota yo kwishyura izongerwa ku mafaranga yawe asigaye ako kanya nyuma yo kwishyura.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Nta kwiyandikisha ufite. Kandi bizongerwa ku kugura kwawe kuri Plus €19/ukwezi—iminota 60 iri muri gahunda yawe, bityo nta kiguzi cy'inyongera gihari.
paywall.stripeNote: Kwishyura birinzwe na Stripe. Iminota yishyurwa mu buryo bwikora nyuma yo kwishyura.

billingPage.title: Ibiciro by'imisoro n'ubwishyu
billingPage.subtitle: Ibiranga byose bya VibeVox — hitamo gahunda ijyanye n'umuvuduko w'akazi kawe.
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Kureka kuvugurura kwiyandikisha kwawe mu buryo bwikora?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Hagarika kuvugurura mu buryo bwikora. Kwiyandikisha kwawe kuzakomeza gukora kugeza igihe cy'ubu kirangiye.
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Suzuma kuvugurura kwiyandikisha mu buryo bwikora?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Kwishyura bitaha bizaba mu mpera z'igihe turimo.
billingPage.resumeTooltip: Kongera kuvugurura kwiyandikisha mu buryo bwikora.
billingPage.promoHint: Igabanyirizwa rizakoreshwa mu buryo bwikora igihe wiyandikishije kuri gahunda cyangwa uguze iminota y'inyongera.
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Iminota iva mu gihe cyabanje. Babanza kuyirangiza.
billingPage.topupHelp: Indi slider yo kugura. Iraboneka hamwe n'ifatabuguzi rikora.
billingPage.featureHd: Amajwi yo guhindura mu buryo bwa HD (Aoede, Charon, Koreya)
billingPage.featureLearnHub: Ikigo cy’Inyigisho cya AI — imvugo zacyo bwite
billingPage.featurePersonalPrompts: Ibitekerezo bya AI ku giti cyawe
billingPage.featureSmartTags: Gushyira mu byiciro ibikenewe mu buryo bw'ubwenge
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Muraho! Nshishikajwe na gahunda ya Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.faqA1: Iminota idakoreshejwe ikomeza mu kwezi gutaha. Irangira mu kwezi kwa gatatu.
billingPage.faqQ2: Ese nshobora guhagarika kwiyandikisha kwanjye igihe icyo ari cyo cyose?
billingPage.faqA2: Yego. Ushobora guhagarika kuri konti yawe bwite ukanze rimwe. Igihe cy'inguzanyo kizakomeza kugeza kirangiye.
billingPage.faqA3: Urupapuro rwuzuye rwa AI: amakarita y'abakiriya afite imenyekanisha ryikora, uburenganzira bwa Telegram, ubutumwa bwihariye, Kalendari ya Google, gushyira ibirango by'ubwenge ku bikenewe, kohereza CRM, guhuza na questflow.pro, na tab yihariye y'ubuyobozi.
billingPage.faqQ4: Ni uwuhe mutanga serivisi za SIP terefone ukeneye?
billingPage.faqA4: Iyo ari yo yose ikurikiza RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk / FreePBX, nibindi. VibeVox ikora trunk isohoka mu buryo bwikora.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 ku munota. Kuva ku minota 60 kugeza ku masaha 10. Ihabwa inguzanyo ako kanya nyuma yo kwishyura.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: hamwe n'igabanywa rya -{{percent}}% hamwe na kode ya promo {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Incamake y'ibiciro irahari kugeza kuri iyi tariki; hari izindi minota zishobora kugurwa.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Kongera kwiyandikisha byikora byarahagaritswe · kwiyandikisha bizafunga {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Inyandiko z'igenamigambi ryawe zirakora kugeza kuri iyi tariki; ushobora kugura izindi. Kanda "Kongera kuvugurura" niba uhinduye igitekerezo.
billingPage.languagesLead: Urutonde rwuzuye rw'indimi zishyigikiwe no guhindura mu buryo bwihuse icyarimwe. Gutahura ururimi rw'umwimerere mu buryo bwikora—buri wese mu bitabiriye ahitamo ururimi rwe kavukire.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Gerageza imyandikire itandukanye—urugero, mu Cyongereza cyangwa mu nyuguti zo mu gace utuyemo. Niba ururimi rubuze rwose, tubitubwire, maze tuyongereho.

login.title: Murakaza neza
login.subtitle: Injira muri konti yawe ya VibeVox
login.wrongCredentials: Imeri cyangwa ijambo ry'ibanga bitari byo
login.googleSignInFailed: Ntabwo nabashije kwinjira binyuze kuri Google

register.title: Fungura konti
register.subtitle: Kwiyandikisha ku buntu kuri VibeVox
register.passwordTooShort: Ijambobanga rigomba kuba rifite nibura inyuguti 8
register.emailExists: Umukoresha ufite iyi imeri yamaze kwiyandikisha.

forgot.title: Kugarura ijambo ry'ibanga
forgot.subtitle: Andika imeri yawe hanyuma tukoherereze umurongo wo kugarura.
forgot.successHint: Reba imeri yawe niba {{email}}. Niba utabonye imeri, reba muri dosiye yawe ya spam.

reset.title: Ijambobanga rishya
reset.subtitle: Hitamo ijambo ry'ibanga rishya ryo kwinjira.
reset.successHint: Ubu ushobora kwinjira ukoresheje ijambo ry'ibanga rishya.
reset.invalidLink: Iyi link ntiyemewe cyangwa yarangiye. Saba ko ijambo ry'ibanga rishya risubizwaho.
reset.failed: Ntabwo byashoboye kongera gukoresha ijambo ry'ibanga

seo.title: VibeVox — Ubuhinduzi bwa AI mu gihe nyacyo ku majwi ya videwo na SIP
seo.description: VibeVox ni urubuga rwo guhindura amajwi icyarimwe rukoresha AI rutanga ubufasha mu ndimi zirenga 100. Guhamagara kuri videwo, telefoni ya SIP, kuganira n'abakiriya, no gusesengura ibiganiro bikoresha AI birahari.
seo.keywords: Ubusemuzi bwa AI, ubusemuzi icyarimwe, guhamagara videwo hakoreshejwe ubusemuzi, telefoni ya SIP, umusemuzi w'ijwi

footer.poweredBy: Ubuhinduzi bushingiye ku buhanga bwa AI

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox ni umusemuzi wa AI icyarimwe mu guhamagara mu ijwi no mu mashusho mu ndimi 108. WebRTC na SIP telephony, umufasha w'ijwi, n'ubusemuzi mu gihe nyacyo ku gikoresho icyo ari cyo cyose.
pwaInstall.installCta: Ongeraho VibeVox kuri ecran yawe yo mu rugo—guhamagara hakoreshejwe ubuhinduzi, SIP, n'umufasha wa AI mu buryo bumwe gusa. Bikora nk'inyongera.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Jya kuri ecran yo mu rugo - shyira ahagaragara mu kanya gato
